full_text:
Zhao (Yuanjiang)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao, styledYuanjiang, was born in Jianwei. Gave her up her life so husband and son would escape. Zhao was affiliated with Zhao Wei. Zhao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
